title: Operators
description: Master C++ operators including arithmetic, logical, comparison, and bitwise flags for game programming.
learningObjectives: Understand arithmetic, logical, and comparison operators
Explain bitwise operations (AND, OR, XOR, shifts)
Use bitwise flags to efficiently store game character states

sections.title: Operators in Game Logic
sections.content: Operators allow you to manipulate data. While arithmetic (+, -, *, /) and comparison (==, !=, <, >) operators are common, game programmers heavily utilize bitwise operators (&, |, ^, ~) for flag manipulation. Storing active character states (e.g. Crouching, Poisoned, Invulnerable) as bit fields saves memory and improves CPU performance by reducing branch mispredictions.

sections.title: Bitwise Flags for Character States
